zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Rich於1432年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦時，他的父親Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London33歲，母親Catherine Cutherey25歲。他於1464年與Elizabeth Mayne在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1490年在英國米德萊可倫敦享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Rich于1432年出生在英国英格兰倫敦时，他的父亲Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London33岁，母亲Catherine Cutherey25岁。他于1464年与Elizabeth Mayne在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1490年在英国米德萊可倫敦享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a wealthy man (or perhaps in some cases an ironic nickname for a pauper), from Middle English, Old French riche ‘rich, wealthy’, a word of ancient Germanic origin, akin to ancient Germanic rīc ‘power(ful)’.
English: from the Middle English personal name Rich, a pet form of any of the post-Conquest names beginning in Rich-, such as Richer and especially Richard . Compare Rick .

English: either a topographic name from Middle English riche(Old English ric) ‘stream’, signifying one who lived beside a stream, as at Glynde Reach (Sussex), or perhaps a habitational name from the (now lost) village of Riche (Lincolnshire).

variants.name: Ritchie
meanings: Scottish: from a Scottish and northern English pet form of the personal name   Rich  , a short form of   Richard  . This surname is also common in Ulster.

variants.name: Ritch
meanings: English and Scottish (Orkney): either a variant of Rich , or perhaps from a short form of Ritchie , itself a diminutive based on Rich.

Altered form of German Ritsch, probably from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name based on rīc ‘power(ful)’ or hrōd ‘fame, renown’; or an altered form of Swiss German Rütsch, Ruetsch, from Alemannic short forms of Rudolf .

variants.name: Riches
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): variant of Rich , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Richer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Armand, Fernand, Herve, Laurent, Marcel, Aurele, Donat, Elphege, Emile, Flore, Gilles.

English (East Anglia), French, and German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hari, heri ‘army’. The name was introduced into England by the Normans in the form Rich(i)er, Ricier, but was largely absorbed by the much more common Richard .

Altered form of French Héricher: from the ancient Germanic personal name Harigari, composed of the elements hari ‘army’ and gari (from garwa) ‘ready, eager’ or gari ‘spear’, or a variant of Hérissé, a nickname for someone with spiky hair, from the adjective hérissé, a derivative of the verb se hérisser ‘to stand on end’.

variants.name: Riche
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Ghislaine, Philippe, Yanick, Yvon.
French: nickname for a rich man or perhaps an ironical name for a pauper, from Old French riche ‘rich’. Compare Leriche .

variants.name: Richins
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Ricun, a diminutive of Rich , itself a pet form of Richard , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. It appears that a dialectally different (Norman or Picard) form of the French name, with medial /-k-/, also survived in England for a time alongside forms with original /-tʃ-/.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Rich was born in 1432, in London, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London, was 33 and his mother, Catherine Cutherey, was 25. He married Elizabeth Mayne in 1464, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1490, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Rich est né en 1432, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Catherine Cutherey, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Mayne en 1464, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1490, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Rich 1432 in London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London 33 und seine Mutter Catherine Cutherey 25. Er hat 1464 in London, Middlesex, England Elizabeth Mayne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1490 im Alter von 58 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Rich è nato il nel 1432 nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Cutherey, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Mayne nel 1464, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1490, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.London, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスロンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Richが1432年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Richard Rich II, Sheriff of Londonは33歳，母Catherine Cuthereyは25歳であった。1464年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでElizabeth Mayneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1490年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Rich(이)가 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Cutherey(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1464년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Elizabeth Mayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1490년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Rich nasceu em 1432, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Cutherey, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Mayne em 1464, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1490, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Rich родился в 1432 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Cutherey, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Mayne в 1464 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1490 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Rich nació en 1432, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Rich II, Sheriff of London, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Catherine Cutherey, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Mayne en 1464, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1490, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
